description: 杂志衬线 - 衬线大标题 + 大留白,杂志内页感,适合专题报道 / 长篇深度 / 艺术人文

styles.body: font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', 'Songti SC', Georgia, serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #1f1a14; line-height: 1.9; letter-spacing: 0.35px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 20px 16px; background: #fbfaf6;
styles.h1: font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800; color: #1f1a14; text-align: left; margin: 40px 0 18px; padding: 0; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: -0.2px;
styles.h2: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #a0330f; margin: 44px 0 18px; padding: 0 0 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #a0330f; letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.4;
styles.h3: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; color: #1f1a14; margin: 30px 0 12px; padding: 0; letter-spacing: 0.2px;
styles.p: margin: 16px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #1f1a14; line-height: 1.95;
styles.blockquote: margin: 36px 0; padding: 0 8px; background: transparent; border-left: none; color: #1f1a14; font-size: 19px; border-radius: 0; line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: 0.3px; font-style: italic; text-align: center; font-weight: 600;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 0; margin: 28px auto; display: block; border: none;
styles.code_inline: background: #f1ede3; color: #a0330f; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 0; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace;
styles.code_block: background: #1f1a14; color: #f1ede3; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 0; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 26px 0; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; -moz-tab-size: 2; tab-size: 2; font-variant-ligatures: none; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
styles.ol: margin: 20px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #a0330f; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; font-family: Georgia, serif; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #a0330f; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; font-family: Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: #1f1a14; margin: 48px 0; opacity: 0.2;
styles.a: color: #a0330f; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(160,51,15,0.5);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 26px 0; font-size: 14px; border-top: 1px solid #1f1a14; border-bottom: 1px solid #1f1a14; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: transparent; color: #1f1a14; padding: 10px 8px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; border-bottom: 1px solid #1f1a14; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e1cf; color: #1f1a14; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12px; color: #8a7e6a; text-align: center; margin-top: 12px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; font-style: normal;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #a0330f; letter-spacing: 8px; font-size: 18px; margin: 46px 0; user-select: none; font-style: italic; font-family: Georgia, serif;

highlights.hl_yellow: background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 60%, #f4e6a8 60%); color: #1f1a14; padding: 1px 6px; font-weight: 600;

list_style.label: A · 衬线罗马
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; color: #a0330f; font-family: 'Georgia','Times New Roman',serif; font-weight: 700; font-style: italic; font-size: 17px; margin-right: 10px; min-width: 26px;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; color: #a0330f; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 12px; font-weight: 700;
